items.question: ¿Los productos están personalizados para mi tipo de piel?
items.answer: Cada caja está diseñada como una rutina universal, equilibrada y suave, pensada para la mayoría de pieles sanas. En lugar de complejidad, priorizamos compatibilidad y claridad.

items.question: ¿Son tamaño completo o muestras?
items.answer: Sizes may vary. What matters is duration — each product is selected to last until your next box arrives with normal use. You'll never receive two single-use products.

items.question: Will I receive the same type of product twice?
items.answer: No. Each box includes five different product categories that work together as one routine. No repeated categories in the same box.

items.question: What if a product doesn't work for me?
items.answer: We focus on gentle, daily-use skincare to minimize irritation and incompatibility. If something feels off, reach out — we're here to help.

items.question: When does my box ship?
items.answer: Boxes ship monthly, on a predictable schedule. You'll receive tracking information as soon as your box is on the way.

items.question: Can I cancel or skip a month?
items.answer: Yes. You can cancel anytime or skip a month if you need to — no penalties, no questions asked.

items.question: Are the products safe to use together?
items.answer: Yes. Each box is built as a cohesive routine, not a random assortment of products.

finalCta.title: Ready to simplify your skincare?
finalCta.descriptionSecondary: Designed to be finished — not forgotten.
finalCta.footer: Cancel anytime · No commitments · Ships monthly
